news.title: Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
news.summary: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

news.title: Powell, Bessent discussed Anthropic's Mythos AI cyber threat with major U.S. banks
news.summary: Anthropic rolled out the new Mythos AI model to a select group of companies. There are concerns that hackers could exploit its capabilities.

news.title: CoreWeave adds ninth top AI model provider with deal to power Anthropic's Claude
news.summary: The deal comes one day after Meta committed an additional $21 billion in spending to the cloud provider. The deal comes as AI demand continues to soar.

news.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
news.summary: Kevin Warsh's nomination already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current Chair Jerome Powell. President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faces a hurdle.

news.title: Defense's Silicon Valley pivot: Ukraine, Iran wars challenge the legacy playbook
news.summary: Companies are betting on a new type of warfare, based on shorter lead times. Short lead times allow for rapid deployments and more cost-effective solutions.

news.title: You only really need to know one thing to save for retirement
news.summary: Saving for your future can be this simple. Save money for the future by saving for a house or a car. Save for your retirement by saving money for a home or a pension.

news.title: When should parents start saving for college? The answer may surprise you.
news.summary: It's OK to postpone saving for college until you have these 4 financial priorities under control. It’s OK to wait to save until you’ve got your financial priorities in order. You’ll be able to focus on other areas of your life.

news.title: Wall Street’s fear gauge just flashed an unusual signal that could carry the S&P 500 to 7,400 within months
news.summary: The falling VIX is a third sign that the bottom for stocks is in says Fundstrat’s Tom Lee. The falling Vix is also a sign the economy is on the road to recovery, he says.

news.title: CoreWeave’s stock pops as new Anthropic deal highlights intense scramble for AI compute
news.summary: The deal follows an expanded arrangement with Meta that was announced on Thursday. The deal is expected to be in place for at least two years.

news.title: Global chaos has become a permanent guest in your portfolio. This strategist says Big Tech and emerging markets are now essentials.
news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz crisis is not an aberration from the new geopolitical order. Investors need to adjust to this fast, says a Nuveen strategist.
